survey.title: Employee Satisfaction Survey
survey.description: Help us understand your experience working here. Your honest feedback shapes our workplace.

questions.question_text: How satisfied are you with your current work environment?
Do you have the tools and resources needed to do your job effectively?
How would you rate the physical workspace and facilities?
What improvements would you suggest for the work environment?
How would you rate the overall quality of management?
Does your manager communicate clearly and effectively?
Do you feel recognized and appreciated for your contributions?
Are you satisfied with career advancement opportunities?
What professional development would you like more access to?
How likely are you to recommend this company as a great place to work?

survey.title: Customer Satisfaction Survey
survey.description: We value your feedback. Please share your experience with us.

sections.title: Overall Experience
sections.description: Tell us about your overall experience

questions.question_text: How satisfied are you with your overall experience?
How often do you use our products/services?
How did you hear about us?
How would you rate the quality of our products/services?
Did our product/service meet your expectations?
What did you like most?
How satisfied were you with our customer support?
How likely are you to recommend us?
What can we do to improve?

survey.title: Dining Experience Survey

questions.question_text: How would you rate the quality of the food?

Which dishes did you enjoy most?
How would you rate the friendliness of our staff?
How was the speed of service?

How would you rate the restaurant ambience?
Did you feel the price was good value for money?
Would you return to this restaurant?
